description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional lounge upholstered in a smooth, brown leather-like material. The lounge features three large, rectangular back cushions and a single extended chaise section on the right side, providing ample space for reclining. The armrests are straight, wide, and padded, matching the height of the backrest for a cohesive look. The seat cushions are thick and seamlessly integrated, with no visible separations or tufting. The legs are short, blocky, and minimally visible, giving the lounge a grounded and sturdy appearance. The overall design is clean, contemporary, and suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern L-shaped brown leather lounge with three back cushions, a right-side chaise, and wide padded armrests. The design is sleek, sturdy, and comfortable.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three back cushions, wide armrests, and the chaise section extending to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise and the thickness of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the full width of the lounge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the armrest and the end of the chaise section.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, attached back cushions and a single, continuous seat cushion with an integrated right-side chaise section.
attribute_backrest_design: Rectangular, medium-height, segmented into three equal sections, with a flat top and no visible tufting or curvature.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present; straight, wide, padded, and matching the height of the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: Short, blocky, minimally visible legs, likely made of wood or metal, providing a sturdy base.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid brown color with a smooth, untextured leather-like finish and no visible stitching or decorative patterns.
